title: Kingdom Lite Style
description: This is a modpack with a focus on performance and Origins Mod that gives you a lot of fps boost while adding some things to the game, like origins and other features.
body:
# **Description**

- Kingdom Lite Style is a modpack with a small collection of mods that change the experience of a traditional vanilla game.
A Modpack focused on further optimization of the game along with the fun of several famous and great mods, such as Origins Mod, Waystones and icarus.

- In addition to adding minor mechanical changes and better optimization, several environment mods are also added, improving the experience and immersion within the game.

- This is my first modpack and i look forward to continuing to improve it with time and feedback.

## Obs
- Backup your world before download a new version of this modpack.
- This modpack has a difficulty well above normal, it is being balanced to play with the origins I created from the Gods and Heroes mod

# Discord Link: https://discord.gg/EEmXHvkt3g

## Main Mods: 

- Gods and Heroes
- Dark Utilities
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Fabric Hammers
- Mob Captains
- Waystones
- Traveler's Backpack
- Shaders
- Icarus
- Ambient Sounds 5
- Mob Captains
- Nullscape
- Wizzards
- Paladins
 

## Other mods:

- Minimap and World Map
- Reinforced Barrels
- Fabric Seasons
- Better Trims
- Better Tridents
- Dungeon Z
- Dungeons and Taverns
- Explorify
- Hopo Better Mineshaft
- Hopo Better Underwater Ruins
- The Lost Castle
- Wavey Capes
- Tree Harvester
- Advancement Plaques
- Beacon Overhaul
- Blur
- Infinite Trading
- Item Collectors
- Jade
- LambDynamicLights
- Magnum Torch
- No Telemetry
- StepUp
- Stylish Effects
- Trade Cycling
- Universal Bone meal
- Visual Workbench
- Zoomify
